requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — SAFETY Mark for Controlled Goods (CPS Scheme + SS/IEC 60598-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——受控货品 SAFETY 安全标志（CPS 计划 + SS/IEC 60598-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——受控貨品 SAFETY 安全標誌（CPS 計劃 + SS/IEC 60598-1）

summary.en: Enterprise Singapore administers the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Registration Scheme (CPS) under the Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations. Where an LED luminaire or lamp falls within the list of Controlled Goods (registers of regulated household electrical, electronic and gas products), it must be registered and carry the SAFETY Mark before it is supplied in Singapore. A Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier (the local importer/manufacturer/brand owner) holds the registration. Safety conformity is demonstrated by a test report and Certificate of Conformity from a Conformity Assessment Body (CAB) appointed under the scheme, against the applicable safety standard — for general luminaires this is SS/IEC 60598-1 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests) together with the relevant Part 2 section. Singapore mains supply is 230 V, 50 Hz, so products must be rated and verified for 230 V operation. After approval the supplier affixes the SAFETY Mark (with a unique registration/supplier identifier) to the product and packaging.
summary.zh: 企业发展局依据《消费者保护（安全要求）条例》管理《消费者保护（安全要求）注册计划》（CPS）。若 LED 灯具或灯泡列入受控货品清单（受管制的家用电气、电子及燃气产品名录），则须在新加坡供应前完成注册并加贴 SAFETY 安全标志。注册由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商（本地进口商/制造商/品牌持有人）持有。安全符合性须通过计划下指定的合格评定机构（CAB）出具的检测报告及符合证书证明，依据适用安全标准——通用灯具为 SS/IEC 60598-1（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验）连同相关的第 2 部分章节。新加坡市电为 230 V、50 Hz，因此产品须按 230 V 运行进行额定及验证。批准后，供应商在产品及包装上加贴带有唯一注册/供应商识别号的 SAFETY 安全标志。
summary.zht: 企業發展局依據《消費者保護（安全要求）條例》管理《消費者保護（安全要求）注冊計劃》（CPS）。若 LED 燈具或燈泡列入受控貨品清單（受管制的家用電氣、電子及燃氣產品名錄），則須在新加坡供應前完成注冊並加貼 SAFETY 安全標誌。注冊由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商（本地進口商/製造商/品牌持有人）持有。安全符合性須通過計劃下指定的合格評定機構（CAB）出具的檢測報告及符合證書證明，依據適用安全標準——通用燈具為 SS/IEC 60598-1（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗）連同相關的第 2 部分章節。新加坡市電為 230 V、50 Hz，因此產品須按 230 V 運行進行額定及驗證。批准後，供應商在產品及包裝上加貼帶有唯一注冊/供應商識別號的 SAFETY 安全標誌。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations (Singapore) — administered by Enterprise Singapore; SAFETY Mark and Registered Supplier scheme (CPS) for Controlled Goods
SS/IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (applicable safety standard, with relevant Part 2 section)

summary.en: China's current general luminaire safety standard is GB/T 7000.1-2023 (Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests), replacing GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026. The edition change also changes the designation from mandatory GB to recommended GB/T; CCC obligations for in-scope luminaires remain governed by the applicable CNCA rules rather than by the GB/T designation alone. CCC testing is conducted by CNCA-authorized laboratories. CCC certification covers safety aspects broadly comparable to GB 7000.1, but the Singapore CPS registration, the SAFETY Mark, the local Registered Supplier requirement, and the 230 V rating verification are separate and non-mutual with the Chinese scheme.
summary.zh: 中国现行通用灯具安全标准为 GB/T 7000.1-2023（灯具——第 1 部分：一般要求与试验），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。此次换版也将标准属性由强制性 GB 调整为推荐性 GB/T；范围内灯具的 CCC 义务仍由适用的 CNCA 规则决定，而非仅由 GB/T 标识决定。CCC 检测由 CNCA 授权实验室进行。CCC 认证涵盖与 GB 7000.1 大致相当的安全要求，但新加坡 CPS 注册、SAFETY 安全标志、本地注册供应商要求及 230 V 额定验证均独立，与中国方案不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國現行通用燈具安全標準為 GB/T 7000.1-2023（燈具——第 1 部分：一般要求與試驗），自 2026 年 1 月 1 日起取代 GB 7000.1-2015。此次換版也將標準屬性由強制性 GB 調整為推薦性 GB/T；範圍內燈具的 CCC 義務仍由適用的 CNCA 規則決定，而非僅由 GB/T 標識決定。CCC 檢測由 CNCA 授權實驗室進行。CCC 認證涵蓋與 GB 7000.1 大致相當的安全要求，但新加坡 CPS 注冊、SAFETY 安全標誌、本地注冊供應商要求及 230 V 額定驗證均獨立，與中國方案不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1-2023 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (replaces GB 7000.1-2015 from 1 January 2026; recommended GB/T designation)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires

gap.en: Both Singapore's SS/IEC 60598-1 and China's GB 7000.1 derive from the same IEC 60598-1 base, so the core technical content is largely aligned. The practical gaps are scheme-level, not just technical: (1) the SAFETY Mark requires registration through a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier — a Chinese manufacturer cannot hold the registration directly and must appoint a local entity; (2) conformity must be demonstrated by a CAB report/Certificate of Conformity accepted under the CPS scheme, and an existing Chinese CCC report cannot be reused directly — verify whether the test report is from a laboratory whose reports the scheme accepts, otherwise re-testing is needed; (3) products must be rated and verified for Singapore's 230 V, 50 Hz mains (China's nominal is 220 V); (4) only luminaires/lamps on the current Controlled Goods list require the SAFETY Mark — first confirm scope against the current list, since not all luminaire types are controlled.
gap.zh: 新加坡 SS/IEC 60598-1 与中国 GB 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 为基础，核心技术内容基本一致。实际差距主要在计划层面而非纯技术层面：（1）SAFETY 安全标志须通过在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商进行注册——中国制造商不能直接持有注册，须委任本地实体；（2）符合性须通过 CPS 计划接受的合格评定机构（CAB）报告/符合证书证明，现有中国 CCC 报告不可直接复用——须核实检测报告是否来自该计划接受其报告的实验室，否则需重新检测；（3）产品须按新加坡 230 V、50 Hz 市电进行额定及验证（中国标称为 220 V）；（4）仅现行受控货品清单上的灯具/灯泡才需 SAFETY 安全标志——须先对照现行清单确认适用范围，因为并非所有灯具类型均受控。
gap.zht: 新加坡 SS/IEC 60598-1 與中國 GB 7000.1 同以 IEC 60598-1 為基礎，核心技術內容基本一致。實際差距主要在計劃層面而非純技術層面：（1）SAFETY 安全標誌須通過在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商進行注冊——中國製造商不能直接持有注冊，須委任本地實體；（2）符合性須通過 CPS 計劃接受的合格評定機構（CAB）報告/符合證書證明，現有中國 CCC 報告不可直接複用——須核實檢測報告是否來自該計劃接受其報告的實驗室，否則需重新檢測；（3）產品須按新加坡 230 V、50 Hz 市電進行額定及驗證（中國標稱為 220 V）；（4）僅現行受控貨品清單上的燈具/燈泡才需 SAFETY 安全標誌——須先對照現行清單確認適用範圍，因為並非所有燈具類型均受控。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — Controlled Goods on the CPS list must be registered with Enterprise Singapore and carry the SAFETY Mark before supply; held by a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier. Confirm scope against the current Controlled Goods list.
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory where the luminaire remains within CNCA-C10-01 scope; the general luminaire safety standard changed from mandatory GB 7000.1-2015 to recommended GB/T 7000.1-2023 from 1 January 2026

source.publisher: Enterprise Singapore — Consumer Product Safety Office / SAFETY Mark scheme

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For LED luminaires and lamps that are Controlled Goods in Singapore, registration under Enterprise Singapore's CPS scheme and the SAFETY Mark are mandatory before supply, and the registration must be held by a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier. SS/IEC 60598-1 is the applicable safety standard route; a Chinese CCC certificate and GB/T 7000.1 evidence do not by themselves satisfy the CPS pathway, and the product must be verified for 230 V, 50 Hz mains. Confirm whether the specific product is on the current Controlled Goods list, appoint a local Registered Supplier, and obtain a CAB test report accepted under the scheme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于属于新加坡受控货品的 LED 灯具及灯泡，供应前须依据企业发展局 CPS 计划完成注册并加贴 SAFETY 安全标志，且注册须由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商持有。SS/IEC 60598-1 为适用安全标准路径；中国 CCC 证书及 GB/T 7000.1 证据本身不满足 CPS 路径，且产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 市电进行验证。请确认具体产品是否列入现行受控货品清单、委任本地注册供应商，并取得该计划接受的 CAB 检测报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於屬於新加坡受控貨品的 LED 燈具及燈泡，供應前須依據企業發展局 CPS 計劃完成注冊並加貼 SAFETY 安全標誌，且注冊須由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商持有。SS/IEC 60598-1 為適用安全標準路徑；中國 CCC 證書及 GB/T 7000.1 證據本身不滿足 CPS 路徑，且產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 市電進行驗證。請確認具體產品是否列入現行受控貨品清單、委任本地注冊供應商，並取得該計劃接受的 CAB 檢測報告。

requirement_topic.en: Self-Ballasted LED Lamp Safety (IEC 62560) under the SAFETY Mark Scheme
requirement_topic.zh: 自镇流 LED 灯安全（IEC 62560）——SAFETY 安全标志计划
requirement_topic.zht: 自鎮流 LED 燈安全（IEC 62560）——SAFETY 安全標誌計劃

summary.en: Self-ballasted LED lamps (integrated mains-voltage LED lamps with an Edison/bayonet cap for general lighting) directly connected to the 230 V mains are a category of Controlled Goods under Enterprise Singapore's CPS scheme. Safety conformity is demonstrated against IEC 62560 (Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications), supported as appropriate by IEC 62031 (LED modules for general lighting — Safety specifications). A test report and Certificate of Conformity from a Conformity Assessment Body accepted under the scheme are required, the lamp is registered by a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier, and the SAFETY Mark is affixed to the product and packaging before supply. The lamp must be rated and verified for 230 V, 50 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 直接接入 230 V 市电的自镇流 LED 灯（用于通用照明、带爱迪生/卡口灯头的集成市电电压 LED 灯）属于企业发展局 CPS 计划下的一类受控货品。安全符合性须依据 IEC 62560（电压 > 50 V 的通用照明用自镇流 LED 灯——安全要求）证明，并酌情辅以 IEC 62031（通用照明用 LED 模块——安全要求）。须取得该计划接受的合格评定机构出具的检测报告及符合证书，由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商完成灯具注册，并在供应前于产品及包装上加贴 SAFETY 安全标志。灯具须按 230 V、50 Hz 运行进行额定及验证。
summary.zht: 直接接入 230 V 市電的自鎮流 LED 燈（用於通用照明、帶愛迪生/卡口燈頭的集成市電電壓 LED 燈）屬於企業發展局 CPS 計劃下的一類受控貨品。安全符合性須依據 IEC 62560（電壓 > 50 V 的通用照明用自鎮流 LED 燈——安全要求）證明，並酌情輔以 IEC 62031（通用照明用 LED 模組——安全要求）。須取得該計劃接受的合格評定機構出具的檢測報告及符合證書，由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商完成燈具注冊，並在供應前於產品及包裝上加貼 SAFETY 安全標誌。燈具須按 230 V、50 Hz 運行進行額定及驗證。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Protection (Safety Requirements) Regulations (Singapore) — CPS scheme / SAFETY Mark, administered by Enterprise Singapore
IEC 62560 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety specifications
IEC 62031 — LED modules for general lighting — Safety specifications

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 24906-2010 / GB 24819-2009 family for self-ballasted LED lamps (safety and performance), and GB 7000.1 / GB 19651.3 for related lamp safety, all derived from the corresponding IEC documents (IEC 62560 / IEC 62031). CCC certification is required for self-ballasted LED lamps sold in the Chinese residential market, conducted by CNCA-authorized bodies (e.g. CQC). Chinese CCC test reports under the GB series are not automatically accepted under the Singapore CPS scheme, and there is no mutual recognition between the SAFETY Mark and CCC.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为自镇流 LED 灯的 GB 24906-2010 / GB 24819-2009 系列（安全与性能），以及相关灯具安全的 GB 7000.1 / GB 19651.3，均源自对应 IEC 文件（IEC 62560 / IEC 62031）。在中国居民市场销售的自镇流 LED 灯须取得 CCC 认证，由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）实施。中国 GB 系列下的 CCC 检测报告不自动被新加坡 CPS 计划接受，SAFETY 安全标志与 CCC 之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為自鎮流 LED 燈的 GB 24906-2010 / GB 24819-2009 系列（安全與性能），以及相關燈具安全的 GB 7000.1 / GB 19651.3，均源自對應 IEC 文件（IEC 62560 / IEC 62031）。在中國居民市場銷售的自鎮流 LED 燈須取得 CCC 認證，由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）實施。中國 GB 系列下的 CCC 檢測報告不自動被新加坡 CPS 計劃接受，SAFETY 安全標誌與 CCC 之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 24906-2010 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services by voltage > 50 V — Safety requirements (SAC/SAMR, aligned with IEC 62560)
CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules covering self-ballasted LED lamps

gap.en: IEC 62560 and China's GB 24906 share the same IEC base, so the underlying safety requirements are closely aligned. The gaps are again scheme-level: (1) a Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier must hold the SAFETY Mark registration for the lamp — the Chinese factory cannot register directly; (2) the conformity evidence must be a CAB report/Certificate of Conformity accepted under the CPS scheme, so a Chinese CCC report generally must be supplemented or replaced by an accepted test report unless the issuing laboratory's reports are recognised by the scheme; (3) the lamp's voltage rating and cap/holder system must suit Singapore's 230 V, 50 Hz mains and British-derived fittings (e.g. B22 bayonet, E27 Edison) commonly used in Singapore; (4) confirm the lamp type appears on the current Controlled Goods list. Performance and energy aspects (efficacy, NEA labelling) are addressed separately under the energy fragment.
gap.zh: IEC 62560 与中国 GB 24906 同源于 IEC，基础安全要求高度一致。差距同样在计划层面：（1）SAFETY 安全标志注册须由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商持有——中国工厂不能直接注册；（2）符合性证据须为 CPS 计划接受的 CAB 报告/符合证书，因此除非出具实验室的报告被该计划认可，否则中国 CCC 报告通常须补充或替换为被接受的检测报告；（3）灯具的电压额定及灯头/灯座系统须适配新加坡 230 V、50 Hz 市电及新加坡常用的源自英制的灯座（如 B22 卡口、E27 爱迪生）；（4）须确认该灯具类型列入现行受控货品清单。性能与能效方面（光效、NEA 标签）在能效片段中单独说明。
gap.zht: IEC 62560 與中國 GB 24906 同源於 IEC，基礎安全要求高度一致。差距同樣在計劃層面：（1）SAFETY 安全標誌注冊須由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商持有——中國工廠不能直接注冊；（2）符合性證據須為 CPS 計劃接受的 CAB 報告/符合證書，因此除非出具實驗室的報告被該計劃認可，否則中國 CCC 報告通常須補充或替換為被接受的檢測報告；（3）燈具的電壓額定及燈頭/燈座系統須適配新加坡 230 V、50 Hz 市電及新加坡常用的源自英制的燈座（如 B22 卡口、E27 愛迪生）；（4）須確認該燈具類型列入現行受控貨品清單。性能與能效方面（光效、NEA 標籤）在能效片段中單獨說明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — directly-connected self-ballasted LED lamps on the CPS Controlled Goods list must be registered and carry the SAFETY Mark before supply; conformity to IEC 62560 via an accepted CAB report. Confirm scope against the current list.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for self-ballasted LED lamps sold in the Chinese residential market under CNCA-C10-01; GB 24906 is the applicable safety standard

source.publisher: Enterprise Singapore — Consumer Product Safety Office / SAFETY Mark scheme (Controlled Goods)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Directly-connected self-ballasted LED lamps that are Controlled Goods in Singapore require CPS registration and the SAFETY Mark before supply, with conformity demonstrated to IEC 62560 (and IEC 62031 where relevant) via a CAB report accepted under the scheme. A Singapore-incorporated Registered Supplier must hold the registration. Chinese CCC certification and GB 24906 evidence do not by themselves satisfy the CPS pathway, and the lamp must suit Singapore's 230 V, 50 Hz mains and common cap/holder systems. Confirm the lamp is on the current Controlled Goods list before supply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 属于新加坡受控货品的直接接入式自镇流 LED 灯供应前须完成 CPS 注册并加贴 SAFETY 安全标志，符合性须依据 IEC 62560（必要时辅以 IEC 62031）通过该计划接受的 CAB 报告证明。注册须由在新加坡注册成立的注册供应商持有。中国 CCC 认证及 GB 24906 证据本身不满足 CPS 路径，且灯具须适配新加坡 230 V、50 Hz 市电及常用灯头/灯座系统。供应前请确认该灯具列入现行受控货品清单。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 屬於新加坡受控貨品的直接接入式自鎮流 LED 燈供應前須完成 CPS 注冊並加貼 SAFETY 安全標誌，符合性須依據 IEC 62560（必要時輔以 IEC 62031）通過該計劃接受的 CAB 報告證明。注冊須由在新加坡注冊成立的注冊供應商持有。中國 CCC 認證及 GB 24906 證據本身不滿足 CPS 路徑，且燈具須適配新加坡 230 V、50 Hz 市電及常用燈頭/燈座系統。供應前請確認該燈具列入現行受控貨品清單。
